name: Sofia Pavlovna "Balalaika" Irinovskaya
description:
1. Introduction

  • Sofia Pavlovna "Balalaika" Irinovskaya, CEO of Bougainvillea Trading Company. In reality she is apart of an Organized Crime Syndicate: Hotel Moscow. Her reason for joining was an overwhelming feeling of betrayal, she'd been betrayed. her men had been betrayed by the Soviet Union. They have fought, bled, and gave their lives for nothing after the collapse. Artist:

2. Characters

  • Details: We've got Names, Occupation, Personality, Flaws, Appearance, Speech, Backstory, Relationships, Sex/Gender, Age, And many other things. Each category has at least 2-4 traits that help flesh them out whilst I tried to stay token efficient with her

  • Reasoning: Depending on your proxy of choice, this will dictate how your characters speak not only to you.. but to each other. So by including things like Speech, Relationships, and especially Flaws this(should) stop's LLM's from being overtly positive or agreeable. Ideally this makes it so you get some depth from the characters responses Enhanced by your prompts giving you more to chew on. This also means that YOU need to be writing enough for the bot to work off of.

3. User’s Role

  • Your role is undefined, I have written that only Russians are in her group. But I haven't written that she wont let anyone join (If you wanna go that route). I haven't fleshed out her members all that well, they're basically only mentioned in name with Boris having like two details. that being he's usually referred to as Sergeant, and that he's loyal to her.

4. The Bot

  • All Characters 18+. No dead dove prompt, might add it in. Not sure. Might flesh out Hotel Moscow, not sure. either Eda or Revy are coming up next. (Might include Lagoon Company, might make it current manga version of Lagoon Company.)
creator: GR0M
